description: A physical game server reports a critical hardware failure (e.g., a failed hard drive) and goes offline.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the hardware failure alert from the data center monitoring system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies the specific server and the nature of the hardware fault.

nodes.task_description: Remove the failed server from the active matchmaking pool.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the matchmaking configuration to stop sending players to the dead server.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket for the data center operations team to physically replace the failed hard drive.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a hardware replacement ticket.
